title: notopleura leucantha
intro: Notopleura leucantha, also known as Ochrosia leucantha, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimalarial effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. Notopleura leucantha has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, pain, and malaria, and has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture for use in herbal remedies, and its extracts have been studied for potential applications in the development of new medicines.
